steps.title: Build a two-row table
steps.content: Use slope-intercept form $f(x)=mx+b$. The point $(0,5)$ is the $y$-intercept, so $b=5$. The slope is $m=\frac{1}{4}$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The fitted line has slope $\frac{1}{4}$ and intercept $5$, so $f(x)=\frac{1}{4}x+5$. The distractors use intercepts $\frac{1}{5}$, $-\frac{5}{4}$, or $-5$ instead of $5$. A is correct.
